source: bundled (shipped with the repo and plugin zip)

derivative.description: Official TouchDesigner documentation — 25,887 chunks, 674 operators. Scraped from docs.derivative.ca.

popx.description: POPx GPU-accelerated operators — 59 operators. Build locally from your own licensed POPx scrape via scripts/build_popx_brain.py.
popx.install_notes: POPx is a paid TouchDesigner plugin. Public hosting of the prebuilt brain isn't provided — see data/brains/popx.yaml + scripts/build_popx_brain.py to build your own from a legitimate POPx scrape.
